programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Two British families set up shop in Spain to sell property to Britain families looking for a bit of fun in the sun.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Feeling the Squeeze in Seoul, South Korea
programme.desc: A college graduate wants to move from Las Vegas to Seoul, South Korea to be with her long-distance boyfriend; the high cost of small apartments in Seoul and her limited budget might make it difficult.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Interior Design Masters
programme.desc: The designers are tasked with transforming five luxury apartments in London's Elephant and Castle; working in pairs, each team must transform an apartment together.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Ready vs. Reluctant in Espiritu Santo, Vanuatu
programme.desc: He plans to use the archipelago as a backdrop for his nature videos, but the lack of western amenities has her rethinking the move entirely.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Family Seeks Multigenerational Home in Costa Rica
programme.desc: A father-daughter team searches for a million-dollar multigenerational home on the jungle coast of Brasilito, Costa Rica; they have an extensive wish list in which an ocean view, a pool and separate guest quarters are all required.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Singing in the City, in Stockholm
programme.desc: After a health scare, a husband and wife look to fulfill their dream of living abroad in Stockholm, Sweden; he seeks the vibrancy of the city center, but space is hard to come by in town and she needs enough room to teach opera lessons from home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: NYC Woman Seeks Love in Amsterdam
programme.desc: An NYC woman leaves everything for one last shot at finding love and starting a family in Amsterdam; she searches for her dream man as well as the dream apartment, but with Amsterdam's housing crunch, those dreams may be in jeopardy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Community Connection vs. Comfort in Tulum, Mexico
programme.desc: A couple looks to escape their hectic Miami lives and slow down in Tulum, Mexico; he pictures a walker's paradise in the heart of the older downtown, but she wants a spacious and luxurious new build in the suburbs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: The Return of Ciao House, Puglia Edition
programme.desc: The celebrity chef of "Ciao House" is back again this season; the stakes are even higher as he hunts for a seaside farmhouse in Southern Italy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After their daughter's birth, a young couple leaves Florida for a better work-life balance in Valencia, Spain; he's hoping to replicate the space and luxury of their suburban home, but she's looking to enjoy city life and save money for traveling.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Charmed by an Amsterdam vacation, an adventurous Oregon family looks to relocate and go all-in on the Dutch way of life; dad looks to experience life in the city, but mom wants the kind of spaciousness that's only found in the outskirts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Recapturing the Excitement of Their Youth in La Drova, Spain
programme.desc: After 30 years together, two ex-circus performers decide to shake up their quiet life and relocate to La Drova, Spain; he wants a secluded standalone house and doesn't mind reno projects, but she wants a traditional Spanish home that's move-in ready.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Ex-Army Brats in Bury St Edmunds
programme.desc: A couple who met in high school in Germany reconnected 15 years later, married and blended their families; now empty nesters, they're leaving their large Florida home behind to revisit European life together in Bury St Edmunds, England.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Mining for a House in Gympie, Australia
programme.desc: After seven years in Spain and with four children, a couple looks to move back to his homeland of Australia; he's starting a new career in the mining town of Gympie, but with just one income, striking gold won't be easy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Riding the Winds of Change in Wellington
programme.desc: After living in a small condo in Canada, a family chases a dream job in Wellington, New Zealand, where they're hoping to find a standalone house with a yard that's close to schools and work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple realize their closed-off layout and underutilized space don't work for their growing family; they call on Drew and Jonathan to transform the main floor and balance their modern aesthetic with child-friendly function.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple loves their 1950s home, but its dated layout prevents everyone from gathering in the same place; Drew and Jonathan revamp their floor plan and create a main living room, dining room and kitchen where the family can make memories.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A home's cramped, closed-off layout no longer functions for a young, growing family; with the help of the couple's spunky 6-year-old daughter, Drew and Jonathan step in to create a fresh, bright space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: After putting projects on hold to raise their family, a couple need help tackling half-finished projects; Drew and Jonathan overhaul several rooms to give the family a bright and cozy transformation they can share with friends and neighbors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A comics-loving couple know their new home needs a super makeover, so they're living in the basement and haven't unpacked or bought furniture; Jonathan and Drew give several spaces a modern-yet-traditional transformation and help furnish the home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: After good neighbors helped them through a recent health scare, a couple do not want to leave their home, but they need more storage, flow and functionality; Drew and Jonathan transform the living room and kitchen, making a master retreat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: Pratima and Parmjeet's big home poses an even bigger challenge for Jill as she tries to fix several glaring dysfunctions and create an in-law space.

programme.desc: Portia and Glen's crumbling character home has a tiny kitchen and only one working bathroom for their family of five.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: Karalyn and Todd's 1960's house needs more than a renovation; Jillian must radically redesign the entire layout to keep Karalyn at home, while Todd tries to tempt them with a new house.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Mel and Roy have lost control of their home; their creative and energetic kids have turned the entire main floor into an art explosion that knows no boundaries; even the walls have turned into a kiddie canvas; feeling embarrassed and overwhelmed, no amount of effort seems to help; Kortney and Kenny sharpen their focus to create some order: a dedicated space for art, a reorganized kitchen, a tranquil room for adulting, and a proper dining room is finally born.

programme.title: The Block Australia
programme.desc: Teams compete to see who can renovate houses on Phillip Island for the most profit, as the properties are placed on auction soon after refurbishments are completed.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Following her divorce, an English mom of two looks for a new life and a new career as a private investigator on Australia's Sunshine Coast. She wants a home that's by the beach, but finding a place that meets her high standards may be a challenge.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Peter and Bryan Jr. each struggle to build summer getaway homes as winter approaches.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat builds three gazebos for two brothers in upstate New York; Bryan Jr. asks his son to take charge of his first build.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat takes on a 15,000 square foot mansion; Joel and Bryan Sr. set up a gazebo for a museum.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Joel and Shawn deal with broken logs and stubborn headers; friends and family help transform a garage into a cabin.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat and Sam are invited to a paint ball battle; Peter rebuilds a barn for a friend.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Impressive builds and memorable moments from season 1.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: Jenn reenvisions a couple's 1960s home, which suited their family when they had one kid, but now they have three and the space is closing in on them; Jenn takes the house from cramped and cluttered to open and airy with an organic, modern design.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: With their kids off to school, a couple finally has the time to renovate their house; Jenn is ready to lean into their casual and traditional style, but there's trouble in No Demo City as Jenn and Victor clash over some porcelain countertops.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A man and his two older sons move back in together after the passing of their wife and mother; Jenn delivers a modern space with rustic and industrial elements that recognize the past while ushering hope for the future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: After getting married, a couple bought their beautiful Tudor home, started a business, had a baby and now another is on the way; Jenn looks to heighten their Tudor vibe and create a cohesive, cozy space to finally make their house feel like a home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple began renovations on their home when he suddenly passed away; now, Jenn is taking the reins to help her finish their dream home, bringing a traditional yet modern design that will keep his spirit alive while giving her a fresh start.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A family's DIY renovations quickly died on the vine when their busy lives got in the way; Jenn swoops in to take over, finishing their uncompleted projects and delivering his dream of a luxury Vegas bathroom with her love of coastal design.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A woman and her father have been trying to DIY her house for years, resulting in bad paint jobs and exposed concrete floors; now, they're ready to hand the reins over to Jenn, who looks to inject vintage style into a modern, single-woman space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple is so perplexed by the layout of their 1960s home that they're ready to move; Jenn, however, wants to convince them to stay with a homestead-style renovation that combines vintage elements and cozy functionality with a modern organic twist.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple left the custom home they loved in Utah for her job; Jenn's goal is to get them to fall in love all over again by infusing a custom, contemporary vibe without changing the layout.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Matt and Sam are at their wit's end. The daily grind of raising two young kids while juggling careers and Matt's busy marathon schedule has worn them down. They have no time to keep their home organized and clutter has consumed their lives, taking a toll on their relationship. Kortney and Kenny help them through the emotional journey of letting go, so they can get their home organized, functional, and a place to love again.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Sunshine sets the stage as Lara Spencer pits two teams against each other in a sunroom design showdown. Grandma-core faces off with Brownstone Classic, bringing ambitious plans, creative DIYs, and more plants than you can count.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a space into a swanky speakeasy, pitting Moroccan flair against Art Deco glamour as they hunt for standout pieces and reimagine secondhand finds into dramatic, high-style designs.
